'''âd-f-v-p''' ('''kadafvepoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:haggravate|haggravate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-f-v-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:haggravate|haggravate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âd-f-v-p
|-
! Lemma
| kadafvepoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidafvepoko|thidafvepoko]] || [[word:jidafvepoko|jidafvepoko]] || [[word:shidafvepoko|shidafvepoko]] || [[word:kidafvepoko|kidafvepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudafvepoko|thuthudafvepoko]] || [[word:jujudafvepoko|jujudafvepoko]] || [[word:shushudafvepoko|shushudafvepoko]] || [[word:kukudafvepoko|kukudafvepoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodafvepoko|thodafvepoko]] || [[word:jodafvepoko|jodafvepoko]] || [[word:shodafvepoko|shodafvepoko]] || [[word:kodafvepoko|kodafvepoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadafvepoko|thadafvepoko]] || [[word:jadafvepoko|jadafvepoko]] || [[word:shadafvepoko|shadafvepoko]] || [[word:kadafvepoko|kadafvepoko]]
|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
